emails.subject: Re: 360 Networks Enron Net Works NDA
emails.body: Re: 360 Networks Enron Net Works NDA Yes, I compared their blackline below against the draft I originally sent out, and the only changes were to the counterparty name, "or its affiliates" language, and NY from Texas, the same changes showing in the blackline below. Mark Greenberg@ENRON 02/12/2001 04:50 PM

emails.subject: RE: 360 Networks Enron Net Works NDA
emails.body: Tana When you have a chance, we need to finalized the 360 NDA pursuant to the changes proposed by 360 and the change I proposed below. Thanks. Mark Senior Counsel, ENA Phone: 713-345-8897 Facsimile: 713-646-3940 E-Mail: Mark.Greenberg@enron.com Forwarded by Mark Greenberg/NA/Enron on 02/28/2001 06:17 PM Jennifer Farac <Jennifer.Farac@360.net> 02/28/2001 06:10 PM
